prompt: A realistic cinematic scene of a lone hiker descending a steep, uneven mountain slope covered in thick fog. The hiker moves cautiously, feeling the ground with each step, unsure of the path ahead. The terrain subtly slopes downward toward a valley barely visible through the mist. No trails or markers are visible. The environment feels natural and physically real, with rocks, loose soil, and irregular slopes. Soft overhead lighting creates shadows that emphasize the contours of the land. Highly detailed, photorealistic, no text, no symbols, no diagrams.
metaphor: A blind hiker stepping downhill in fog; local slope guides movement toward a hidden valley minimum.
